title: Bāghpat Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Bāghpat with a Z-Score of +3.14. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Bāghpat is causing extremely hot conditions with a CDD of 10.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 59% and the wind speed is 1.0 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The lack of significant wind and high temperatures are exacerbating the heat wave, causing a critical situation.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
